# Sondr Designs
> Sondr Designs is a web design and development agency based in Honolulu, Hawaii. We build high-performance websites, conversion-focused design, and SEO strategies for service businesses.

## Core Services
- [Web Design & Development](https://sondrdesigns.com/services): Custom Next.js websites built for speed, conversion, and scalability. Average build time under seven days.
- [Website Design](https://sondrdesigns.com/services): Conversion-focused UI/UX design. No templates — every project is built from scratch.
- [Conversion Rate Optimization](https://sondrdesigns.com/services): User experience design that guides visitors to book, call, or buy.
- [SEO](https://sondrdesigns.com/services): Technical SEO built into site architecture. Keyword strategy, content optimization, schema markup.
- [Local SEO](https://sondrdesigns.com/services): Google Business Profile management, local directory sync, location-based landing pages for Hawaii businesses.

## Portfolio
- [Our Work](https://sondrdesigns.com/work): Portfolio of completed projects including Blend (café discovery web app) and KHM Tutoring (Hawaii K-12 tutoring, 30% conversion increase).

## Company
- [The Studio](https://sondrdesigns.com/studio): About our team — Aizen Chung (CEO/Founder), Toshio Nagai (CTO/Founder), Joseph Kim (Head of Design). Based in Honolulu, Hawaii.
- [Contact](https://sondrdesigns.com/contact): Book a free discovery call or send a project inquiry.

## Key Facts
- Founded and headquartered in Honolulu, Hawaii, USA
- Specializes in service-based businesses
- Average website build time: under 7 days
- Average Lighthouse performance score: 96+
- Average page load time: under 1 second
- Contact: studio@sondrdesigns.com | (808) 721-9350
- Social: https://www.instagram.com/sondr.designs/ | https://www.linkedin.com/company/sondrdesigns/
